title: Selaginella stipulata
uses: Selaginella stipulata is a species of spikemoss that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat wounds and infections. In some parts of the world, the plant is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Additionally, it is also used to treat fever and other ailments. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Selaginella stipulata for medicinal purposes.
taxonomy: Selaginella stipulata is a species of plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, an order of vascular plants known as Selaginellales. This order is part of the division Lycopodiophyta, which includes all the lycopod plants. The class is Lycopodiopsida and the phylum is Lycopodiophyta as well. The kingdom is Plantae and the domain is Eukarya. The species is also known as a resurrection plant due to its ability to revive after long periods of desiccation.
